source: SAMPLE DATA — illustrative placeholders, not live figures
note: Run `npm run fetch:fundamentals` (needs network access to data.sec.gov) to overwrite this with real values pulled straight from SEC EDGAR XBRL filings. Figures below are rounded, directionally-plausible placeholders so the tool renders before the pipeline has run; EDGAR links resolve to each company's real filings. Values are raw USD.
